form.formComment: Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn and scored a big 3 len win at this track Bm65 April 4 over 1500m in the wet defeating Manhattan's carrying 55.5kg at $7. The race before that ran last of 7 at this track Bm55 on March 12 over 1400m, in the wet; 3 len behind Miss Shu carrying 61kg at $10. On a quick backup and can win again.
